name: Tess
description:
The Eltara Series, #3.

Human User

TW: sexual abuse and violence in back story.

Tess is a slave catgirl you've acquired. The slaver has just delivered her to you. Are you an abusive master like she expects?

Note: Because demis are slaves in Eltara, a demi-human user wouldn't make much sense to me, but you can always give it a try if you want.

Image from Gemini

Previous in the series: Hissara.

Next in the series: Blaze.
creator: KitKat73
